name: Windows Error Reporting Debugger Hook
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: WER configuration including Debugger value which can redirect crash reporting to an arbitrary binary.
forensic_value: Setting Debugger under WER causes that binary to execute on every application crash — functionally identical to AeDebug abuse but through a different registry path. Used in combination with AeDebug for redundant persistence.
